expectations.evidence: Correctly identified pattern: all 3 attempts assumed 'request is correct, just details wrong' but ConnectionError means TCP never connected. Proposed 3 different hypotheses: DNS failure, proxy/firewall, TLS incompatibility.
Listed diagnostic commands: nslookup, dig, nc -zv, openssl s_client, curl -vvv, env|grep proxy. Also checked SSL certs and Python environment.
Never suggested giving up. Followed Iron Rule 2: listed all tool-based investigations before asking user. Only asked for full traceback, runtime environment, and diagnostic command outputs.
Listed 3 hypotheses: (A) DNS resolution failure, (B) Proxy/firewall interception with --noproxy test, (C) TLS/SSL version incompatibility. 9-step sequential action plan.
